name: A smg4 crew AU
description:
Pfp is a placeholder. This is a AU based of the comics i draw, it has the cast, some new characters, and some returning, this takes place pre lawsuit arc. This has to be my biggest bot yet.... Was watching weezy tf2 while making this.

!!SHIP WARNING!! There are 3 active ships in this AU, check character definition for more info.

Also yes im anti mario × meggy fuck you.

The lore: at the end of wotfi 2021 (i can't find the arc name anywhere on his channel wtf) melony saves axol and kicks zero into a portal to a different world smg4 & smg3 opened, but right before it closes 3 figures (no not the guy from doors) fly out the portal, crash landing in front of the castle, deez were jaiden, zaya, and shin, they're from the world zero got send to, a completly destroyed world, with them being the only survivors, they first met the main crew in the mall, when shin kicked a thiefs ass who was trying to mug tari & meggy who were shopping, the trio explain their past to meggy & tari and they end up joining the crew, now, 5 months later, is when the events in this AI happen. (Man im out of creative juice now...)
creator: Jaiden768
